_doc: DOI alias map. Maps alias P-IDs to canonical P-ID for the same paper. Source: chapter strategy doc 2026-05-13 based on two independent audits. Until reader scripts honor this map, treat as documentation only.

canonical_notes.P90: 10.1002/adfm.202509530 — title mismatch with P5, PDF verify before locking X.3.1 / X.5 claims
canonical_notes.P43: 10.1021/acsbiomaterials.0c01761 — anomaly detection anchor (P66 has same DOI, ref-list pollution)
canonical_notes.P14: robotic in-situ / surface reconstruction anchor for X.5
canonical_notes.P74: ML prediction / optimization, audit flagged for chunk cleanup
canonical_notes.P26: self-driving bioprinting lab anchor for X.5
